theme_and_archetype.theme: Hybrid (Light for Dashboards/Hubs, Dark/Magical for Battle/Camera)
theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) merged with Mobile RPG Gaming aesthetics (Genshin / Puzzle & Dragons style)
theme_and_archetype.core_emotion: Anything can become a game. Magic, low-barrier feeling, tactile, and rewarding.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900 drop-shadow-sm
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-800
rules.game_hud: text-xl font-black text-white drop-shadow-[0_2px_2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)] stroke-black stroke-2

primary.description: Magic Blue - Used for primary actions, magic themes, and student UI.

secondary.description: Energy Gold - Used for rewards, combos, coins, and premium CTAs.

accent_magic.description: Mystic Purple - Used for boss themes, magical transformations, and spell effects.

accent_health.description: Nature Green - Used for player HP, correct answers, and success states.

danger.description: Boss Red - Used for boss attacks, wrong answers, and danger meters.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12 (Generous spacing for dashboards, tight/dense for game UI)
layout_and_spacing.game_ui_rules: Bottom-dominant navigation, thumb-friendly action placement, layered modal screens, immersive backgrounds with floating panels.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_ui_rules: Bento grid for analytics. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for playful, tactile buttons. No sharp corners for student-facing UI.

components_strategy.buttons: Tactile, 'bouncy' feel. Heavy drop shadows that compress on active state (translate-y-1 shadow-none).
components_strategy.cards: For Study Modes: large, illustrated cards with vibrant gradients and iconography.
components_strategy.game_hud: Progress bars for HP (Green) and Boss HP (Red). Combo counters that scale up in size. Draggable/Tappable word fragments.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn based but customized with rounded corners, large touch targets, and playful focus rings (ring-4 ring-blue-300).

motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale up (scale-105) for game elements, translate-y-1 for buttons.
motion_and_interactions.magic_moment: 3-5s sequence: Image upload -> Blur/Glow -> Floating Runes -> Flash to World Map. Use Framer Motion orchestrations.
motion_and_interactions.battle_feedback: Screen shake on boss attack. Particle burst on correct combo.

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react for dashboards, custom SVGs or emojis for game elements.
icons_and_assets.style: Chunky, bold, duotone or filled icons for the game. Clean line icons for parent/teacher dashboard.

media_urls.description: Fantasy floating islands landscape, magical world tree, portals. Use in Landing Page.
Student adventurer. Use in Identity Selection and Kid Home Profile.
Parent guardian holding shield. Use in Identity Selection.
Teacher mage with spellbook. Use in Identity Selection.
Glowing camera interface concept. Use as background/overlay for the OCR Camera Upload magic moment.
Cute menacing fantasy boss. Use in the Battle Game Screen.
Fantasy game world map. Use as background for Kid Home World / Mission Hub.

landing_page.visuals: Hero background image with a dark gradient overlay at the bottom. Floating magic particles.
landing_page.content: Main Title: '拍下任何教材 即刻變成挑戰冒險', Subtitle: 'Homework becomes Adventure'. Big vibrant 'Start Adventure' CTA.

identity_selection.layout: 3-column grid on desktop, stacked on mobile.
identity_selection.visuals: Glassmorphism cards over blurred hero background. Each card features the 3D character (Student/Parent/Teacher) with distinct magical auras.

kid_home_world.layout: Mobile-game lobby layout. Full-screen world map background.

camera_upload.visuals: Use magic_camera_bg as overlay. Glowing edge scanner. Multi-upload up to 3 files. Magic Moment animation uses Framer Motion to dissolve worksheet into glowing runes.

study_mode_selection.modes: 讀默 Memory Mist Battle, 背默 Expedition Trial, Quiz Lightning Challenge, Exam Ultimate Trial.

battle_game_screen.top: Boss Monster image + Boss HP Bar (Red) + Danger meter.
battle_game_screen.middle: Puzzle Field (vocab tiles, word fragments, tap/drag interactions).
battle_game_screen.bottom: Player HP (Green) + Skill Energy + Combo Counter.

parent_dashboard.content: Reassuring emotion. Child's progress as 'Hero's Journey' milestones, not just charts. Quick upload feature. Suggestions card.

teacher_dashboard.layout: Control room grid, clean and functional with magic accents.
teacher_dashboard.content: Classroom raids setup, room codes generation, student progress matrix.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the JSON rules and color systems provided. Do NOT use default Tailwind blue unless specified.
Use 'Fredoka' for headings and 'Nunito' for body. Import from Google Fonts.
Student-facing UI must look like a mobile game (Genshin/P&D style) using the provided immersive background URLs and characters. Do not use generic SaaS layouts for the Kid views.
Use framer-motion heavily for the game screens: button bounces, combo popups, and the AI transformation magic moment (worksheet to runes).
Parent/Teacher dashboards should use Shadcn components but themed warmly (rounded corners, soft shadows).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use ONLY the URLs provided in the media_urls section.
